---
title: Hello!
about:
  template: broadside
  image: Sections/Home/LuluPhoto.jpeg
  image-width: 600px

format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 0px
      body-width: 1400px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    max-width: 1600px

toc: false
---

Welcome to this conglomerate of things I've worked on or participated in. A more full picture can be found on my github page linked below.

At the moment I'm currently finishing my MPH in Public Health Data Science at the University of Minnesota's School of Public Health in the division of Biostatistics and Health Data Science. In that time I've been able to work as both a teaching assistant and a research assistant at the university while getting to be apart of many groups and organizations in my time.

Prior to embarking on that adventure I finished my undergrad a short distance away at the University of St. Thomas completing a BS in Data Analytics with minors in Biology and Applied Statistics. During my time I worked full-time for Information and Technology Services (ITS), for over two years I completed numerous projects and initiatives I hope to be helpful for years to come.

My interest in health sciences began as a child centering around the intricacies of the human body and how it works. While in high school I was part of the biomedical sciences at Coon Rapids for four years; additionally I was the first student to participate in both the biomedical and engineering programs.

### Hobbies

Data visualization, dashboards, and communication

Cooking, and sometimes baking

Plants and botany

General exercise but primarily weightlifting

And as always floor time.
